name: $1M ARR with single page site builder
snippet:
17 Nov 2023 — Carrd is such an incredible business. $1M+ ARR with 2 person team. Running 4M sites now; Bootstrapped for the first 5 years.
Carrd is a great example of the power of constraints. While every other website builder is trying to do it all, Carrd is intensely focused on a single use case - 1 page websites.
